title: Squirrel Removal in Merrick, NY
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Merrick, Long Island. Safe, humane extraction and exclusion. Licensed experts serving Merrick homes and businesses. Call today for $900-$2,500 solutions.
intro: Squirrels in your Merrick attic or walls can cause serious damage to insulation, wiring, and structural components. Best Pest Control NYC provides professional squirrel removal services throughout Merrick, from the waterfront homes near Norman J. Levy Park to the tree-lined residential streets near Merrick Avenue. Our licensed technicians use humane trapping and permanent exclusion methods to protect your Long Island property.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Merrick homeowners for years with safe, effective squirrel removal that addresses both immediate infestations and long-term prevention. Our technicians are familiar with the unique challenges of Long Island properties, including the gray squirrels common to Nassau County, and we guarantee our exclusion work to keep your home squirrel-free.
localContext: Merrick's mature trees and proximity to green spaces like Cammann's Pond Park and the Norman J. Levy Park & Preserve create ideal habitat for squirrels seeking entry into homes, especially during fall and winter months. The mix of Cape Cod, Colonial, and Ranch-style homes throughout South Merrick and Merrick Park are particularly vulnerable to attic invasions through roof vents, soffits, and chimney caps.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Merrick?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Merrick typically ranges from $900 to $2,500 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of exclusion work needed. This includes humane trapping, removal, entry point sealing, and cleanup. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates for all Merrick properties.

faqs.question: What are signs of squirrels in my Merrick home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include scratching or scurrying sounds in your attic or walls, especially during early morning and evening hours, chewed wood or wires, squirrel droppings in the attic, damaged roof vents or soffits, and visible entry holes on your roof line. You may also notice increased squirrel activity on your roof or near potential entry points.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my Merrick property?
faqs.answer: We can typically schedule an inspection within 24-48 hours for Merrick residents. The removal process usually takes 3-7 days depending on how many squirrels are present and their location. Once all squirrels are removed, we immediately seal entry points to prevent re-entry and can complete the entire process within one to two weeks for most properties.

faqs.question: Do you repair damage caused by squirrels in Merrick homes?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer complete squirrel damage restoration including insulation replacement, wire repair, wood damage repair, and sanitization of affected areas. Squirrels often damage attic insulation, chew through electrical wiring, and leave droppings that require professional cleanup. We can assess all damage during our initial inspection and provide a comprehensive estimate for repairs.
